name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: 4500 Peoria St in Denver, CO offers Western Union money orders 24/7.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only is located at 4500 Peoria St in Denver, CO, operating as a standalone check-cashing store. This Denver location is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, serving residents and visitors who need urgent access to money orders and check-cashing services at any time.

At the 4500 Peoria St location in Denver, you can send money orders, cash checks, and access related financial services. For questions about rates, services, or availability, contact the staff directly at +1 303-307-1278. The team is available around the clock to assist with your transactions.

If you're a Denver resident who needs to cash a check or send a money order on a weekend, late night, or holiday, this 24-hour location on Peoria St is available when you need it. Bring a valid government-issued ID for any transaction. This is a convenient option for quick money transfers in the Denver area.
pros: 150+ agent locations in Denver area for convenient access to services
24/7 online platform allowing customers to initiate transfers anytime, with in-store payment based on agent hours
Multiple payment methods and service options (money transfers, cash pickup, money orders, bill payments, mobile top-ups)
Multilingual support in 6 languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Extended operating hours at many locations, with some agents open until 11:59 PM
Western Union Rewards program for recurring customers
No bank account required to send or receive money
cons: Not all agent locations offer identical services—some are money order-only locations with limited functionality
Payout limits at certain locations (e.g., $300 maximum at Walgreens #356)
Service availability depends on third-party retail agent hours, which vary by location
Western Union's transfer fees and exchange rates are typically higher than bank alternatives
Website experienced technical issues during testing (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable message)
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need to send money without a traditional bank account
International remittance senders supporting family or contacts abroad
Consumers needing quick cash pickup from transferred funds in Denver area
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and international remittance senders who need reliable, multilingual access to money transfer and cash pickup services across Denver's retail network. The main caveat is that service availability varies significantly by agent location—some offer limited services (money orders only), and consumers must verify specific services and payout limits at their chosen location before relying on Western Union for time-sensitive transactions.
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 4500 Peoria St, Denver, CO. 24-hour check cashing & money orders.
